chunks.title: Judah's Sin and Exile
chunks.reason: Oracle pronouncing judgment on Judah's engrained sin and resulting exile.

chunks.title: Trust in Man vs Trust in God
chunks.reason: Argument contrasting the fate of those who trust in flesh versus Yahweh.

chunks.title: Prayer for Healing and Vindication
chunks.reason: Prayer acknowledging God's sanctuary and pleading for healing and deliverance.

chunks.title: Sabbath Command at the Gate
chunks.reason: Law regarding Sabbath observance delivered at the city gates with blessings and curses.
